panels.title: AUPIMO (pixel) - historique par run
panels.description: pixel_aupimo_1e-5_1e-3 par run, candidat vs prod. Source: MLflow Postgres (lecture seule).

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_timestamp(r.start_time / 1000.0) AS "time", concat(ts.value, ' - ', tm.value) AS metric, m.value AS value FROM metrics m JOIN runs r ON r.run_uuid = m.run_uuid JOIN experiments e ON e.experiment_id = r.experiment_id AND e.name = 'iqa-model-quality' AND r.lifecycle_stage = 'active' LEFT JOIN tags ts ON ts.run_uuid = m.run_uuid AND ts.key = 'stage' LEFT JOIN tags tm ON tm.run_uuid = m.run_uuid AND tm.key = 'model_version' WHERE m.key = 'pixel_aupimo_1e-5_1e-3' AND $__timeFilter(to_timestamp(r.start_time / 1000.0)) ORDER BY 1

panels.title: pixel_ap - historique par run
panels.description: pixel_ap par run, candidat vs prod. Source: MLflow Postgres (lecture seule).

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_timestamp(r.start_time / 1000.0) AS "time", concat(ts.value, ' - ', tm.value) AS metric, m.value AS value FROM metrics m JOIN runs r ON r.run_uuid = m.run_uuid JOIN experiments e ON e.experiment_id = r.experiment_id AND e.name = 'iqa-model-quality' AND r.lifecycle_stage = 'active' LEFT JOIN tags ts ON ts.run_uuid = m.run_uuid AND ts.key = 'stage' LEFT JOIN tags tm ON tm.run_uuid = m.run_uuid AND tm.key = 'model_version' WHERE m.key = 'pixel_ap' AND $__timeFilter(to_timestamp(r.start_time / 1000.0)) ORDER BY 1

panels.title: image_auroc - historique par run
panels.description: image_auroc par run, candidat vs prod. Source: MLflow Postgres (lecture seule).

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_timestamp(r.start_time / 1000.0) AS "time", concat(ts.value, ' - ', tm.value) AS metric, m.value AS value FROM metrics m JOIN runs r ON r.run_uuid = m.run_uuid JOIN experiments e ON e.experiment_id = r.experiment_id AND e.name = 'iqa-model-quality' AND r.lifecycle_stage = 'active' LEFT JOIN tags ts ON ts.run_uuid = m.run_uuid AND ts.key = 'stage' LEFT JOIN tags tm ON tm.run_uuid = m.run_uuid AND tm.key = 'model_version' WHERE m.key = 'image_auroc' AND $__timeFilter(to_timestamp(r.start_time / 1000.0)) ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Dernieres valeurs par run (4 metriques, candidat vs prod)
panels.description: latest_metrics par run de l'experience iqa-model-quality. Source: MLflow Postgres (lecture seule).

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_timestamp(r.start_time / 1000.0) AS "time", tm.value AS model_version, ts.value AS stage, max(CASE WHEN lm.key = 'pixel_aupimo_1e-5_1e-3' THEN lm.value END) AS aupimo, max(CASE WHEN lm.key = 'pixel_ap' THEN lm.value END) AS pixel_ap, max(CASE WHEN lm.key = 'image_ap' THEN lm.value END) AS image_ap, max(CASE WHEN lm.key = 'image_auroc' THEN lm.value END) AS image_auroc FROM latest_metrics lm JOIN runs r ON r.run_uuid = lm.run_uuid JOIN experiments e ON e.experiment_id = r.experiment_id AND e.name = 'iqa-model-quality' AND r.lifecycle_stage = 'active' LEFT JOIN tags ts ON ts.run_uuid = lm.run_uuid AND ts.key = 'stage' LEFT JOIN tags tm ON tm.run_uuid = lm.run_uuid AND tm.key = 'model_version' GROUP BY r.start_time, tm.value, ts.value ORDER BY r.start_time DESC
